title: ShootC2SPacket client send (left-click detection + per-tick send) + modifierVersion anti-cheat (3-strike rule)
reference_files: C:/Users/GGxia/Desktop/YanbweMod/ModularShoot/设计文档.md#L1962-2008 (ShootC2SPacket design: client per-tick send, server stateless processing, modifierVersion anti-cheat 3-strike mechanism)
acceptance_criteria: ShootC2SPacket record implements CustomPacketPayload with Codec + StreamCodec, field: modifierVersion (int from GunData)
Client-side: ClientTickEvent.End handler detects player holding left-click (attack key) + main hand is gun item, sends ShootC2SPacket every tick; stops sending on release
Client does NOT calculate fire rate or decide whether to shoot - only sends request signal
Server-side handler: validates main hand is gun, validates modifierVersion via anti-cheat, performs fire-rate tick check, processes shoot (delegates to M3 shoot flow)

modifierVersion anti-cheat: per-player inconsistency counter (initial 0) + baseline snapshot; consistent -> reset counter, update baseline; inconsistent -> counter+1; counter < 3 -> tolerate, update baseline; counter >= 3 -> reject + WARN log (player name, packet version, server version) + reset counter + update baseline (no kick)
Server does not maintain shoot session state - each packet independently validated and processed
Packet registered in ModularShootPackets via PayloadRegistrar.playToServer
